description.en: Unlimited basic shell access, limited to 50 commands per month
description.zh: 无限的基本Shell访问，每月最多50个命令

description.en: Unlimited shell access, 500 commands per month, up to 50MB file size
description.zh: 无限的Shell访问，每月最多500个命令，最大50MB文件大小

weaknesses.en: Limited to 50 commands per month in the free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费版每月最多50个命令的限制

targetAudience.en: Developers and IT professionals who need shell access for personal or small projects
targetAudience.zh: 需要为个人或小型项目访问Shell的开发人员和IT专业人士

positioning.en: MyShell is a user-friendly platform for developers to access and manage their shell environments with AI assistance
positioning.zh: MyShell是一个为开发人员提供友好界面并借助AI协助管理其Shell环境的平台
